_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.

_contextSnippet: Rapamycin treatment at 5 and 20mg/kg/day doses resulted in suppression of S6 activation using both phospho-S6-Ser 235/236
resourceName: Nf1 GFAP CKO mice (Nf1 flox/flox; GFAP-Cre)
details: Rapamycin at 5 and 20mg/kg/day suppressed S6 activation (phospho-S6-Ser 235/236), but no significant reduction at 2mg/kg/day dose
